subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath caused the Supreme Pen to speak through His penetrating Will and His all-compelling Purpose which dominateth all things, and hath made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انطق القلم الاعلی بارادته النافذة و بشیته المهیمنة علی الاشیاء و اظهر
